recent_posts.text:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s Jacket Has Sold at Sotheby’s for $960,000
Source:
https://x.com/LongJourneyVC/status/2078198778839130611

tweet.text:
The final number for the iconic Jensen Jacket went for $960,000. We are blown away and so deeply moved. 

All proceeds go towards funding the next generation of young minds to build the world they imagine (through grants and fellowships) at Edge City (of whom we are so proud to be a second believer).  

Thank you first and foremost to Jensen for his generosity and care. Thank you also to the Sotheby's team for working with us on this philanthropic initiative.   Most importantly congratulations and thank you to the winner of this legendary jacket. We are excited to host you for a Denny's meal as well (at the restaurant where NVIDIA was founded).  

Onwards.

Galaxy launches institutional DeFi vault services on Morpho –
Link
Galaxy Digital launched "Galaxy Curator," an institutional-grade treasury management service built on Morpho and available to 2,400+ institutional clients through Fireblocks Earn. It lets institutions earn on-chain yields on idle stablecoins without managing DeFi infrastructure directly.
Matters because:
It removes a key barrier to institutional DeFi adoption and could bring more stablecoin liquidity into yield protocols.

Across Protocol Hit by Solana Exploit, User Funds Safe but Risk Labs Relayer Potentially Impacted  > Across Protocol was attacked on Solana, with user funds unaffected but the Risk Labs relayer potentially facing losses. Solana deposits have been disabled…

tweet.text:
Update: Solana deposits are re-enabled. Across is fully operational.

• No user funds were lost.
• All in-flight Solana transfers were completed or fully refunded.
• Relayer losses were contained to Risk Labs and do not affect the protocol or users.
• The ACX token buyout is unaffected and will continue as planned.

Full technical post mortem next week. Thank you to @SEAL_911 and our community for their support.

Official comms will come only from this account or @hal2001; please ignore phishing links.

Trust or Verify: The Case for Private AI
“
Trust
- for tasks that are execution-and agent-heavy
…
For the higher-level thinking that separates a firm from its rivals, V
erify.
”
> The piece argues that as frontier labs' IP leakage concerns mount, the performance overhead of verifiable privacy is now compressing to near-zero.
> The real opportunity lies in the unsolved gaps: private training loops inside enclaves, sealed agent tool calls, and blind search indexes

BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider Alpaca raised $135 million to expand into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services. The funding is aimed at infrastructure for both DeFi and TradFi companies pursuing on-chain business models.

UK and U.S. governments align on stablecoin regulatory framework for cross-border payments –
Link
The UK and U.S. treasuries released a joint 10-point roadmap to coordinate oversight of tokenized assets and stablecoins. The plan requires 1:1 backing by high-quality liquid assets and segregated reserves, and both sides will explore pathways for stablecoins issued in either jurisdiction to access the other market.
Matters because:
Clearer cross-border rules could make compliant stablecoins easier to use in both markets and support broader institutional adoption.

recent_posts.text:
SBI HOLDINGS TO MAKE SINGAPORE CRYPTO PLATFORM COINHAKO A CONSOLIDATED SUBSIDIARY
SOURCE

Just dropped a practical breakdown of founder growth on X.
Here’s your TL;DR ↓
• In B2B, buying decisions are shaped by hidden buyers, internal champions, and execs – not just the visible contact.
• For crypto teams, X still matters: CoinGecko says X, Telegram, and YouTube make up 84% of crypto community social time.
• The article’s core point is simple: founder growth is a trust system, not a posting-frequency problem.
• The common failure mode is volume without position – daily posts, recycled threads, and AI-polished founder copy.
• Green Dots maps the fix into seven layers: expertise zones, expertise circles, tone of voice, long-form authority, QTs/comments, relationship density, and dynamic optimization.
• AI is useful for research, clustering, and first drafts; it should not replace the founder’s judgment, edit, or point of view.
• The real signal is relationship density: replies, DMs, intros, and inbound from the right circles matter more than raw follower count.
Read the full story here:
How to Grow a Founder Persona on X: A Practical Founder Growth System

Across Protocol Hit by Solana Exploit, User Funds Safe but Risk Labs Relayer Potentially Impacted
> Across Protocol was attacked on Solana, with user funds unaffected but the Risk Labs relayer potentially facing losses. Solana deposits have been disabled pending a full post-mortem.
Source:
https://x.com/AcrossProtocol/status/2078036118209982566

tweet.text:
At ~5:30 AM UTC today, Across was attacked on Solana. User funds are safe. No users were affected, and all bridge transactions have been completed.

Solana deposits have been disabled. The protocol is otherwise operating unaffected.

The only funds potentially lost belong to the relayer operated by Risk Labs (the foundation supporting Across).

Addresses that we are tracking with @SEAL_911:
8bkoZToaTBBtAPczgHqD4XVxWtvBkiy4crtexEtYDYSL
0xa0C0e9f307b5A26cA3FB5891c19154fc7A02BeF7
0xA6fb971F3B7a9b9F76EdA76bc89268fe26560189

We will post additional information as we have it, and a full post mortem in the coming days. Comms will only come from this address; please ignore phishing links.

recent_posts.text: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence  > Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter model built on our Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals, with native vision capabilities and a 1-million-token context window.   > Designed for frontier intelligence across long-horizon…

tweet.text:
Big news: Kimi-K3 by @Kimi_Moonshot is now #1 in the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 pts, surpassing Claude Fable 5.

This is a 17-place jump from Kimi-k2.6 (#18 -> #1).

In Frontend, Kimi-K3 ranked #1 in 6 of 7 domains: Brand & Marketing, Reference-Based Design, Data & Analytics, Consumer Product, Simulations, and Content Creation Tools, landing #2 only in Gaming behind Fable 5.

The full model weights will be released by July 27.

Congrats to the @Kimi_Moonshot team on this major milestone!

recent_posts.text:
Positive ETF flows support Bitcoin and Ethereum –
Link
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $79.1 million in net inflows on July 16, led by BlackRock's IBIT at $33.4 million. Ethereum ETFs posted $28 million in net outflows, though they have still attracted $96 million in inflows over the past three days, mainly via BlackRock's ETHA.
Matters because:
Sustained ETF inflows can help support price stability and may encourage more altcoin rotation.
